mapper.select: SELECT o.INBOUND_ID, o.PLANT_CD, o.INBOUND_NO, o.INBOUND_STATUS, o.VENDOR_CD, o.WAREHOUSE_CD, o.EXPECTED_DT, o.ACTUAL_DT, o.RECEIVE_PLAN_ID, o.INBOUND_RMK, o.REG_USER_ID, o.REG_DTM, o.UPD_USER_ID, o.UPD_DTM, p.PLANT_NM, v.VENDOR_NM, w.WAREHOUSE_NM, c.COM_NM AS INBOUND_STATUS_NM FROM MCS_INBOUND_ORDER o INNER JOIN MST_PLANT p ON o.PLANT_CD = p.PLANT_CD LEFT JOIN MST_VENDOR v ON o.VENDOR_CD = v.VENDOR_CD LEFT JOIN MST_WAREHOUSE w ON o.WAREHOUSE_CD = w.WAREHOUSE_CD LEFT JOIN COM_CODE c ON c.GRP_CD = 'MCS_IB_STATUS' AND o.INBOUND_STATUS = c.COM_CD WHERE o.INBOUND_ID = #{inboundId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MCS_INBOUND_ORDER ( PLANT_CD, INBOUND_NO, INBOUND_STATUS, VENDOR_CD, WAREHOUSE_CD, EXPECTED_DT, ACTUAL_DT, RECEIVE_PLAN_ID, INBOUND_RMK, REG_USER_ID, REG_DTM ) VALUES ( #{plantCd}, #{inboundNo}, #{inboundStatus}, #{vendorCd}, #{warehouseCd}, #{expectedDt}, #{actualDt}, #{receivePlanId}, #{inboundRmk}, #{regUserId}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE MCS_INBOUND_ORDER SET VENDOR_CD = #{vendorCd}, WAREHOUSE_CD = #{warehouseCd}, EXPECTED_DT = #{expectedDt}, INBOUND_RMK = #{inboundRmk}, UPD_USER_ID = #{updUserId}, UPD_DTM = NOW() WHERE INBOUND_ID = #{inboundId}
UPDATE MCS_INBOUND_ORDER SET INBOUND_STATUS = #{status}, ACTUAL_DT = IF(#{status} = 'COMPLETED', NOW(), ACTUAL_DT), UPD_USER_ID = #{updUserId}, UPD_DTM = NOW() WHERE INBOUND_ID = #{inboundId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM MCS_INBOUND_ORDER WHERE INBOUND_ID = #{inboundId} AND INBOUND_STATUS = 'PLANNED'
mapper.select: SELECT i.INBOUND_ITEM_ID, i.INBOUND_ID, i.ITEM_CD, i.LOT_NO, i.LOCATION_ID, i.EXPECTED_QTY, i.ACTUAL_QTY, i.ITEM_STATUS, i.ITEM_RMK, i.REG_USER_ID, i.REG_DTM, i.UPD_USER_ID, i.UPD_DTM, mi.ITEM_NM, mi.ITEM_SPEC, mi.UNIT, l.LOCATION_CD, c.COM_NM AS ITEM_STATUS_NM FROM MCS_INBOUND_ITEM i INNER JOIN MST_ITEM mi ON i.ITEM_CD = mi.ITEM_CD LEFT JOIN MCS_LOCATION l ON i.LOCATION_ID = l.LOCATION_ID LEFT JOIN COM_CODE c ON c.GRP_CD = 'MCS_IB_ITEM_STATUS' AND i.ITEM_STATUS = c.COM_CD WHERE i.INBOUND_ID = #{inboundId} ORDER BY i.INBOUND_ITEM_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MCS_INBOUND_ITEM ( INBOUND_ID, ITEM_CD, LOT_NO, LOCATION_ID, EXPECTED_QTY, ACTUAL_QTY, ITEM_STATUS, ITEM_RMK, REG_USER_ID, REG_DTM ) VALUES ( #{inboundId}, #{itemCd}, #{lotNo}, #{locationId}, #{expectedQty}, #{actualQty}, #{itemStatus}, #{itemRmk}, #{regUserId}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE MCS_INBOUND_ITEM SET ITEM_CD = #{itemCd}, LOT_NO = #{lotNo}, LOCATION_ID = #{locationId}, EXPECTED_QTY = #{expectedQty}, ACTUAL_QTY = #{actualQty}, ITEM_RMK = #{itemRmk}, UPD_USER_ID = #{updUserId}, UPD_DTM = NOW() WHERE INBOUND_ITEM_ID = #{inboundItemId}
UPDATE MCS_INBOUND_ITEM SET ITEM_STATUS = #{status}, ACTUAL_QTY = #{actualQty}, LOCATION_ID = #{locationId}, UPD_USER_ID = #{updUserId}, UPD_DTM = NOW() WHERE INBOUND_ITEM_ID = #{inboundItemId}
